remember: Students will be able to recall the key events and milestones in India's foreign policy
Students will be able to identify the major factors influencing India's external relations
Students will be able to list the key features of India's non-alignment policy
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of non-alignment and its significance in India's foreign policy
Students will be able to describe the role of Jawaharlal Nehru in shaping India's foreign policy
Students will be able to analyze the impact of the Cold War on India's external relations
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of non-alignment to a contemporary international issue
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of India's foreign policy in achieving its national interests
Students will be able to propose alternative foreign policy options for India
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the role of the Non-Aligned Movement (NAM) in promoting India's foreign policy goals
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of globalization on India's external relations
Students will be able to compare and contrast India's foreign policy with that of other major powers

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the concept of non-alignment and its significance in India's foreign policy
To analyze the role of Jawaharlal Nehru in shaping India's foreign policy
To evaluate the impact of the Cold War on India's external relations
board_exam_objectives: To evaluate the key features of India's foreign policy
To analyze the role of India in regional and global organizations
To evaluate the impact of globalization on India's external relations
